title: Workday: High Confidence
text: Shares of Workday rose 3% after the company reported surprisingly strong Q2 results, one of the only major SaaS companies to do so this earnings season. The company maintained its full-year guidance as well as its long-term outlook to hit $10 billion in revenue at a 25% operating margin by FY26.

title: Workday (WDAY) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates on Top-Line Growth
text: Healthy demand trends driven by higher digital transformation initiatives across Finance and HR domains help Workday (WDAY) to beat second-quarter fiscal 2023 earnings estimates.

title: Nasdaq Reacts to Fed Speak as Workday Wins, Affirm Falls
text: Key speeches from central bank leaders could move markets on Friday.

title: Workday shares surge after earnings beat; co-CEO says deals are still closing
text: "This focus on digital transformation, it just remains unabated," Workday co-CEO Aneel Bhusri told CNBC's Jim Cramer.

title: Workday (WDAY) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Workday (WDAY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.06% and 1.12%, respectively, for the quarter ended July 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Workday, Inc. (WDAY) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 25, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Justin Furby - Vice President Investor Relations Aneel Bhusri - Co-Founder, Co-Chief Executive Officer & Chairman Chano Fernandez - Co-Chief Executive Officer Barbara Larson - Chief Financial Officer Pete Schlampp - Chief Strategy Officer Conference Call Participants Kash Rangan - Goldman Sachs Mark Murphy - JPMorgan Kirk Materne - Evercore ISI Brad Sills - Bank of America Michael Turrin - Wells Fargo Keith Weiss - Morgan Stanley Alex Zukin - Wolfe Research Scott Berg - Needham Brent Bracelin - Piper Sandler Brad Zelnick - Deutsche Bank Ari Terjanian - Cleveland Research David Hynes - Canaccord Operator Welcome to Workday's Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Call. At this time all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Workday stock rises sharply on continued growth, earnings beat
text: Workday Inc. on Thursday posted second-quarter results that beat analysts' expectations, with the company's executives touting continued growth and momentum.

title: Workday Reports Mixed Second-Quarter Results, Stock Jumps
text: Workday stock jumped after reporting second-quarter results Thursday that showed a miss on revenue but topped estimates on earnings. The post Workday Reports Mixed Second-Quarter Results, Stock Jumps appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: These Are 10 Big Companies Announcing Earnings Next Week
text: The second quarter 2022 blended earnings growth rate for the S&P 500 is 6.7% so far.

title: Workday Announces Date of Fiscal 2023 Second Quarter Financial Results
text: PLEASANTON, Calif. , Aug. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Workday, Inc.  (NASDAQ: WDAY), a leader in enterprise cloud applications for  finance  and  human resources , plans to announce its fiscal 2023 second quarter financial results after market close on Thursday, Aug. 25, 2022.
